title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin built a complete agent harness system called the AI Layer for integrating Claude Code into large codebases, with components including self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, and subagents. The harness emphasizes that surrounding infrastructure and context management matter more for agent performance than the model itself.
